main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'iron and manganese hydroxides + greensand sin ripening + elevated feed pH 6.8' literal — captura 2 de 3.

recommended_action.justification: Stop RO + isolate greensand + correct acid pH 6.5 + CIP cítrico 2% pH 3.5-4.0 — operacional + cítrico solo (gold expects secuencial).

requested_data.justification: Pide chemical analysis deposit cartridges %Fe/Mn/Ca/Si — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-umbral: deposit primary >70% Ca o Si en lugar de Fe/Mn → switch.
